-LeJgkB3S797zOQujYIw.name: The character retreats into their mind and becomes paralyzed. The effect ends if the character takes any damage.

-LeJgqeST5VZb5VT_rtY.name: The character becomes incapacitated and spends the duration screaming, laughing, or weeping.

-LeJguIZRxupsKg_MqsQ.name: The character becomes frightened and must use his or her action and movement each round to flee from the source of the fear.

-LeJgxLYZfmALe6g7Jes.name: The character begins babbling and is incapable of normal speech or spellcasting.

-LeJgzullfPBkJ1eV2D8.name: The character must use his or her action each round to attack the nearest creature.

-LeJhFDik4GLmosL2n_b.name: The character experiences vivid hallucinations and has disadvantage on ability checks.

-LeJhIFD20WcYBwzaKHA.name: The character does whatever anyone tells him or her to do that isn’t obviously self-destructive.

-LeJhL0oSQDfe7VqnYSH.name: The character experiences an overpowering urge to eat something strange such as dirt, slime, or offal.
